series_metadata.series_title: Cassette Tapes/Digital Recordings of Commission/Board Meetings
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of cassette tapes or digital recordings of hearings before the Commission or Board.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Tapes or recordings are be retained three years disciplinary file is closed at administrative level or upon expiration of appeals, whichever is later. , tapes or recordings are sent State Archives their retention or destruction
